channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Series of potholes in the run up to the roundabout and on the roundabout, 26th April
item.description:
There are a number of deep potholes, I hit at least 10 road defects in the space of less than 100 yards and encountered more overall.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 155, Ermin Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous parking, 26th April
item.description:
Mini bus parked to close to the junction, making visibility very dangerous Boverton Drive , vans and trucks constantly parking blocking the view one the junction

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 72, Boverton Drive, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Armchair left out on pavement, 26th April
item.description:
Fly tipping - armchair left out on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Nurseries, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple wide potholes and road deterioration on Priory Walk, 26th April
item.description:
Multiple wide potholes, of various depths, and general road deterioration on Priory Walk by Priory Street. Road needs a section of resurfacing to correct this long running problem

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Priory Walk, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10inch hole, 26th April
item.description:
Road hole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Alstone Avenue, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple pot holes, 26th April
item.description:
Tobyfield Road, Bishop’s Cleeve is constantly being “patched. These have been so badly “patched” these patches are breaking apart. As stoke road through tredington was completely resurfaced (brilliant job) I believe Tobyfield Road requires the same treatment. There are so many potholes either ignored or badly patched it is difficult in a car and therefore must be near impossible on a motorbike or push bike. Come on highways, please sort this out.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tobyfield Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped items, 26th April
item.description:
Large box of random rubbish

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Dunalley Parade, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped item, 26th April
item.description:
Talk cupboard off Dunalley Parade

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Dunalley Parade, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Roadwork signs left, 26th April
item.description:
3 areas where road barriers and signs left round Brockhampton- bakers wood road and oxlease area . No road names

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenhampton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Button temperamental at best, 26th April
item.description:
Button on east side of crossing does not work. West is fine.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 75, Hales Road, Battledown, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle in turning area, 26th April
item.description:
Car has been left here for over a month, with the windows left open. We have had significant rain fall in that time and the windows have been open the entire time. This car also prevents merchant coaches from using a turning area that was put in to aid them reversing into depot.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cordwainers Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Terrible attempt at repair, 26th April
item.description:
Dangerous pot hole, dangerously repaired. Cars are having to leave the lane into traffic to get around the pot holes. Just fix it correctly rather than bodge jobs.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pittville Circus, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sink holes all over rode after full by junction, 26th April
item.description:
The sink holes previously reported here have now started to become pot holes and cracks appearing in the tarmac. They are throwing tarmac up in the air when driven over. These were previously reported and said not bad enough to fix. Now they should be fixed before it gets even worse
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 164, Arle Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signage and cones not removed, 26th April
item.description:
Corner of porturet way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Porturet Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Overflowing bin, 25th April
item.description:
Overflowing bin outside the wok wagon old Cheltenham rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Old Cheltenham Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pilgrove way after the roundabout at bushy way on the right smashed up glass, 25th April
item.description:
Lots of smashed up glass that is dangerous not only for wildlife but people out dog walking. My dog has already had a cut on his pad from broken glass everywhere. Why not get the people doing community payback to go out cleaning the streets rather than just sat fagging in Springfield Park
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Cornmeadow Drive, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep potholes throughout the road, 25th April
item.description:
Old Gloucester Rd. Traffic having to drive on the wrong side of the road to avoid damaging cars. Try travelling on a bus that has to go over the horrendous potholes and see what it feels like. The road is not fit for vehicles. Try resurfacing it in a proper manner before someone sues the council for damages.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rats living in crack in paving slab in alleg, 25th April
item.description:
Saw a brown rat go into crack under paving slab at ///smug.weedy.falls hygiene issues as restaurants adjacent

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection., 25th April
item.description:
Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection. Two bags, one containing general litter and the other cans/plastic bottles for recycling. Cheltenham Road, Longlevens. Opposite Pearman Briggs Caravans. Next to dog waste bin: 0273 What three words location: ///lunge.laminate.fittingly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucestershire Cycle Spine, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Litter picking bags ready for collection

item.description:
Near No.12

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Alstone Avenue, Alstone, Cheltenham
